disambiguation_rules.independent music creator owners: Clarified in section (a) as entities earning less than $1,000,000 in licensing revenues in prior year OR qualifying as small business under OMB NAICS code 512250; used interchangeably with 'Individual Music Creator Owner' in liability limitations
